game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Little Inferno HD:** Players interact with a virtual fireplace by tapping and dragging various "toys" from an inventory catalog into the fire, observing their unique burning properties, visual effects, and sounds. The core mechanic involves discovering over 50 "combos" by burning specific pairs or groups of items simultaneously, hinted at by cryptic phrases, which rewards the player with stamps and unlocks new catalog entries. Progression is driven by discovering these combos and burning items to earn coins, which are then used to purchase new items from the catalog, with new catalogs unlocking sequentially as story events trigger. The game features no traditional win/loss states; instead, it focuses on a narrative journey where players receive letters and progress through a linear story by continuously burning items and discovering all available combos.
game_info.description: Welcome to Little Inferno HD! You run a virtual fireplace where you burn toys and items to discover mysterious combos. Purchase items from catalogs using coins earned from burning, then drag them into the fire to watch them burn with unique effects. Discover hidden combos by burning specific item combinations together to earn stamps and unlock new catalogs. Progress through the story by continuously burning items and discovering all available combos. There's no losing - just explore, experiment, and uncover the secrets of the fireplace!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate item selection in catalog
Space: Purchase selected item from catalog
Shift: Grab/release item (hold to drag item to fireplace)
Z: Open/close catalog
ESC: Pause/unpause game
ENTER: Start game
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics: purchasing items from the catalog, dragging items to the fireplace, and burning them. Validates that coins are earned from burning items and that the player can purchase new items with those coins.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Opens catalog, purchases first available item, closes catalog, grabs the item, drags it to fireplace center, releases it to start burning. Waits for item to burn completely and coins to be awarded. Repeats process to validate the core loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Items are successfully purchased when player has enough coins. Items burn when placed in fireplace and award coins upon completion. Game state correctly tracks coins, inventory, and burning items. No errors occur during basic gameplay loop.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by discovering all available combos and progressing through all catalogs. This validates that combo detection works correctly and that the game can reach the victory state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically purchases items and burns them in specific combinations to discover all combos. Uses knowledge of combo requirements to efficiently unlock all stamps. Continues until all catalogs are unlocked and all combos are discovered, triggering the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All combos are discovered through correct item combinations. New catalogs unlock as combos are found. Game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state when all combos are discovered. Final score reflects total coins earned and combos discovered.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests edge cases and error handling: attempting to purchase items without enough coins, dragging items outside bounds, burning multiple items simultaneously, and catalog navigation with empty inventory.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Attempts invalid purchases, drags items to various positions, tests boundary conditions for item placement, and validates that the game handles edge cases gracefully without crashes or inconsistencies.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game prevents invalid purchases. Items behave correctly when dragged to any position. Multiple items can burn simultaneously. Game remains stable and responsive under all tested conditions without errors.
TEST_3.description: Tests edge cases and error handling: attempting to purchase items without enough coins, dragging items outside bounds, burning multiple items simultaneously, and catalog navigation with empty inventory.
TEST_3.strategy: Attempts invalid purchases, drags items to various positions, tests boundary conditions for item placement, and validates that the game handles edge cases gracefully without crashes or inconsistencies.
TEST_3.expected: Game prevents invalid purchases. Items behave correctly when dragged to any position. Multiple items can burn simultaneously. Game remains stable and responsive under all tested conditions without errors.
